productTitle: Power Cord C5 EU Plug Black 65cm
name: Power Cord C5 EU Plug Black 65cm
title: Power Cord C5 EU Plug Black 65cm
title_extended: Power Cord C5 EU Plug Black 65cm - C5 Cloverleaf Power Cord, EU plug
short_description: C5 Cloverleaf Power Cord, EU plug
description: The EU-C5-1-B-65 is a high-quality power cord designed for connecting electronic devices that require a C5 connector, often referred to as the "Mickey Mouse" connector, to European standard power outlets. This model is equipped with a European (EU) plug and is particularly suitable for use across Europe where this plug type is standard. The cord is colored in black, offering a sleek and unobtrusive look that easily fits into various professional and domestic settings. Constructed with durable materials, the EU-C5-1-B-65 is built to last and withstand the rigors of daily use. It complies with European safety regulations, ensuring a safe and reliable connection that protects both the device and users from potential electrical hazards.
